author: mark
text:
Fire close-mirror for born-closed GH issues

Plugin-side fix. balls-core honors SyncCreate.status already (sync_report.rs apply_created); the plugin's pull_emit::created_from was hardcoding status=open and last_synced_status=open regardless of the polled GH issue's actual state, so born-closed issues never converged: KnownUpdate fires only on a transition where state != last_synced_status.

Delivered in balls-github-plugin 47fe1f9 (merge of bl-321d). Regression test added: created_from_born_closed_issue_yields_closed_task.
